channel.title: chief-of-stuff cached headlines (fixture)
channel.description: Snapshot of the feeds in feeds.txt, cached 2026-06-25. Offline runs read this file.

item.title: E-bike fleet operators report 30% maintenance savings from predictive telemetry
item.description: Operators piping battery and motor telemetry into maintenance scheduling caught failures weeks early, cutting shop time across commuter fleets.

item.title: Boston adds protected bike lanes around Beacon Hill ahead of summer commuter push
item.description: The new Charles Street segments connect two of the busiest dock locations in the downtown network.

item.title: Agent-skills ecosystem passes 10,000 published skills as enterprises standardize
item.description: The open SKILL.md format keeps spreading; validators and registries are becoming table stakes for agent teams.

item.title: Sourdough hydration debate reignites at national baking expo
item.description: Bakers split over 75% versus 85% hydration; nobody changed their mind.

item.title: Red Sox shuffle bullpen ahead of weekend homestand
item.description: Two call-ups from Worcester as the rotation limps into July.

item.title: Streaming bundle prices climb for the third year running
item.description: The average household now pays more than the old cable bill it cancelled.

item.title: New England weekend forecast: sunny Saturday, muggy Sunday
item.description: Saturday looks clear and 78F in Boston — a good day to be indoors building agents, honestly.

item.title: Global shipping rates tick down for a third straight month
item.description: Container spot rates ease as fuel costs stabilize.

item.title: City Hall Plaza farmers market expands to Thursdays
item.description: Twelve new vendors join the downtown lunchtime crowd.

item.title: Partial lunar eclipse to be visible over the Atlantic next month
item.description: Skywatchers get a modest show in early July, weather permitting.
